exchange_condition: Exact checked write, overwrite, read result, or predecessor transfer retains root, range, generation, and partial-completion state.
boundedness_argument: One row covers every producer-consumer pair because authority kind and binding are canonical.
forbidden_exchange: No metadata, validator, allocation result alone, or high-level external leaf may emit Bytes.

exchange_condition: Capture schema, effects, gate, multiplicity, thread rule, and chosen representation must match exactly.
boundedness_argument: The finite reusable/once constructor split and finite monomorphized signature set bound every exchange.
forbidden_exchange: No raw call pointer, byte buffer, unsafe send promise, or project identity may enter the exchange.

exchange_condition: Every successor consumes the current certificate and preserves the exact role-table owner multiset under a fresh local generation; selection only borrows it for a scoped view.
boundedness_argument: One closed classifier schema and finite K3 opcodes replace operation-specific pairs.
forbidden_exchange: No decoded metadata value, validator result, or overlapping raw store can retain or recreate the certificate.

exchange_condition: The entire affected resource multiset, measure, event prefix, and exact outcome arm must match.
boundedness_argument: Stable, Focus, Progress, Repair, and Poison are a fixed five-state family checked locally.
forbidden_exchange: No callback boolean, writer protocol, wildcard error, or implicit rollback chooses an authority successor.

exchange_condition: Only the declared successful native event transfers the exact offered target lineage; failure retains it.
boundedness_argument: The target-profile atomic opcode table is finite and independent of project operations.
forbidden_exchange: No failed CAS, copied bits, address, relaxed event, or fact may transfer custody.

exchange_condition: Source, target root, action, gate, and closed structural measure remain exact; every normal step consumes before acting.
boundedness_argument: Closed source constructors times fixed terminal leaves form a finite typed product, not an operation-specific table.
forbidden_exchange: No arbitrary finalizer, destructor name, address, validator, or nondecreasing returning cleanup step is accepted.

exchange_condition: Generative domain identity, complete registry, lane roles, admission profile, and ordering profile must remain exact.
boundedness_argument: Finite profile constructors plus symbolic structural folds avoid participant-count unrolling.
forbidden_exchange: No guard, epoch integer, address, policy name, partial registry, or writer invariant may stand in for the domain.

exchange_condition: Facts flow only to optimization and check-elision consumers outside the authority table and retain every invalidator.
boundedness_argument: The closed fact schema is finite; no authority rule lists A-FACT as an origin input.
forbidden_exchange: No fact may emit or restore ownership, validity, custody, observation, retirement, quiescence, or release.

exchange_condition: The generative target, complete structural set identity, exact slots, Open or Closed roles, and slot generations must match; a slot event transforms only its bound leaf.
boundedness_argument: Closed product, sum, span, and strict sources plus nominal state identities make the interaction finite without reachability solving.
forbidden_exchange: No successful CAS alone, address, copied pointer, partial edge list, policy name, or writer reachability assertion can close the set.

exchange_condition: Exact owner install, predecessor state, root, range, type/layout, and local generation must match.
boundedness_argument: Fixed owner opcodes and closed leaf constructors cover all exchanges.
forbidden_exchange: No metadata, address, integer index, writer predicate, validator, or fact produces Live.

exchange_condition: Root, layout epoch, local generation, interval, mode, region, and invalidators are invariant or narrowed.
boundedness_argument: Lexical scopes and exact interval conflicts are syntax-directed; no dynamic borrow graph is searched.
forbidden_exchange: No place, metadata, index, address, wrapper, or guard alone produces a loan or extends its region.

exchange_condition: The exact begin event, domain, lane, generation, and scope remain attached through nested payload loans and end-observe.
boundedness_argument: One begin/end event table and symbolic registry folds bound all uses.
forbidden_exchange: No guard value, copied epoch, address, or unregistered pin creates Observation.

exchange_condition: Every output retains one input value lineage or an admitted base construction; branch multisets must balance exactly.
boundedness_argument: Fixed opcodes and affine CFG equations avoid operation-specific interactions.
forbidden_exchange: No copy, metadata, address, validator, or failed atomic event creates an owner.

exchange_condition: Every exchange proves the same exact root cover, with each leaf owner transferred once and only affected local generations refreshed.
boundedness_argument: Canonical interval products and authority multisets give one generic compatibility test despite many consumers.
forbidden_exchange: No incomplete cover, overlapping store, metadata role, project recognition, or hidden leaf is accepted.

exchange_condition: Domain, cutoff, complete post-cutoff lane coverage, admission closure, and ordering profile must match exactly.
boundedness_argument: OBS-CLOSE is one finite premise schema; registry size is handled by a checked structural fold.
forbidden_exchange: No guard, copied or wrapped epoch, partial scan, stalled lane, writer predicate, or quiescence leaf produces it.

exchange_condition: The exact physical root and whole-layout lineage move without duplication; only terminal release consumes them.
boundedness_argument: One affine escrow per root makes every exchange a constant-form check.
forbidden_exchange: No wrapper, handle, address, metadata, classifier, validator, state successor, or fact produces release authority.

exchange_condition: Successful admission closure plus unlink/custody transfer fixes one domain, cutoff, target root, and terminal action.
boundedness_argument: One affine target right and fixed conversions bound all interactions.
forbidden_exchange: No failed unlink, address, guard, epoch value, metadata, or queue location creates or re-roots it.

exchange_condition: A current parent certificate and exact native selection result bind one shorter-lived exact role footprint.
boundedness_argument: Closed decoder/strict-selector schemas and lexical scope make all exchanges finite.
forbidden_exchange: No metadata, address, index, guard, or callback result alone produces RoleView.

exchange_condition: Only exact acquisition creates rho; transfer or relayout retains the same physical root until terminal release.
boundedness_argument: Generative nominal equality is constant-form and independent of wrapper topology.
forbidden_exchange: No address, wrapper, handle identity, page number, metadata, validator, or fact creates or changes rho.

exchange_condition: Exact publication event, domain binding, root hold, and interference invalidators must match.
boundedness_argument: The publish/share transition table is finite; payload observation remains a separate resource.
forbidden_exchange: No copied address, guard presence, metadata, ordinary load, or fact creates shared access.

exchange_condition: Every transition consumes Nil or the exact unique Node plus tail and preserves the finite root partition bound; selection only borrows the current chain.
boundedness_argument: One inductive linear schema is validated once; runtime chain length is not traversed by the checker.
forbidden_exchange: No non-null head, next address, scan result, metadata, or duplicate node creates Strict.

exchange_condition: The exact rho, lambda, fragment generation, footprint, and matching parent Out identifier move together.
boundedness_argument: One detach/join equation plus fixed fragment-local transitions covers every pair.
forbidden_exchange: No address, page metadata, heap association, map lookup, or copied backpointer produces a subowner.

exchange_condition: Every carried owner, root, generation, event prefix, structural measure, and permitted successor is exact.
boundedness_argument: Finite outcome tables and a local measure avoid protocol inference or global fixpoints.
forbidden_exchange: No writer state relation, callback result alone, implicit rollback, or wildcard error can close Transit.

exchange_condition: Exact allocation or consuming owner transition fixes root, range, generation, and absence of typed liveness.
boundedness_argument: Fixed leaf and owner opcodes cover every exchange.
forbidden_exchange: No zero bit pattern, allocator result without a root, metadata, validator, or fact produces Vacant.

exchange_condition: Canonical exact intervals under one root and layout epoch must match.
boundedness_argument: Sorted finite interval products make every consumer check O(A log A).
forbidden_exchange: No writer disjointness assertion, unknown overlap, solver proof, or metadata can create geometry.

exchange_condition: Only whitelisted loads and checked ordinary calculations feed the closed decoder.
boundedness_argument: The decoder grammar and role table are finite and contain no calls, loops, recursion, or proof terms.
forbidden_exchange: Metadata may select maintained authority but never create any authority kind.

exchange_condition: Only generative acquisition, whole-root relayout, or local SSA state transition supplies the matching nominal identity.
boundedness_argument: Nominal equality and dominance are syntax-directed.
forbidden_exchange: No address, machine counter, wrapped epoch, metadata, validator, or fact is a generative name.

exchange_condition: Exact root, layout epoch, checked interval, and alignment must match.
boundedness_argument: Canonical interval tuples bound every exchange.
forbidden_exchange: No raw address, index, handle, page number, or writer proposition produces a place.
